resolved.fix: Refactored scoreModel/runRecommender in src/engine/recommender.ts (use-case tag aliases, soft budget penalty, plan-fit, free-sub heavy-usage penalty, robust balanced-vs-premium tier split). Also fixed audit stride from 18 → 19 (coprime to 360) so the sample actually spans freeTier/quality/frequency axes.

Added winnerBlock data to 9 guides + fixed empty providerId on how-to-reduce-ai-cost (src/data/guides.json). Added Featured-tools strip with getPrimaryCta-resolved sponsored links to GuideIndex (src/pages/GuidePage.tsx), ResourcesHub.tsx, and AiTypeIndex.tsx.

minorObservations.detail: uniqueVerdicts=1 across 4 presets — verdict copy still doesn't tier by total cost. This is the only remaining P1 from the prior priority list and was out of scope for this pass.

All featured providers (anthropic, openai, deepseek, google, github, cursor, perplexity, mistral, writesonic, jasper, copyai, rytr) currently use directUrl (homepage) — fallbackUsed=true on getPrimaryCta. None have live affiliateUrl yet. Outbound + rel='sponsored' is still emitted, so audits pass; swap directUrl → affiliateUrl in src/data/affiliates.ts as programs are approved without touching pages.
